title: Accounts Assistant
description:
About Our Company

Join the team at Srisun Express, a rapidly expanding and well-loved local F&B chain known for serving delicious Indian-Muslim cuisine to the community. We pride ourselves on operational excellence and a fast-paced, supportive environment. We are looking for a meticulous Accounting Assistant to support our Finance Department operations.

🎯 Key Responsibilities

The Accounting Assistant will play a crucial role in ensuring the smooth and accurate processing of daily financial transactions for our various outlets.

  • Accounts Payable (AP):

    • Process vendor invoices, ensuring accuracy, proper coding, and timely payment.

    • Handle vendor reconciliation and follow up on payment discrepancies.

  • Accounts Receivable (AR):

    • Prepare and issue customer invoices, monitor outstanding debts, and perform timely collection follow-ups.

    • Record and allocate incoming payments accurately.

  • General Ledger & Bookkeeping:

    • Assist in maintaining the general ledger and preparing journal entries.

    • Perform bank and other balance sheet account reconciliations monthly.

    • Assist in the preparation of monthly financial reports.

  • Administrative & Compliance Support:

    • Maintain organized and systematic filing of all financial records and documents (physical and digital).

    • Assist in quarterly GST preparation and filing.

    • Provide support during year-end closing and external audits.

✅ Skills and Competencies Required

Must-Have Technical Skills:

  • Proficiency in accounting software (e.g., QuickBooks, SAP, Xero, MYOB).

  • Strong command of Microsoft Excel (e.g., VLOOKUP, Pivot Tables) and Microsoft Office Suite.

  • Solid understanding of basic accounting principles (Debit/Credit entries).

Required Attributes:

  • Meticulous Attention to Detail: A high degree of accuracy is essential for all bookkeeping tasks.

  • Organizational Skills: Excellent time management and ability to prioritize tasks to meet deadlines in a fast-paced F&B environment.

  • Communication: Able to communicate effectively, both verbally and in writing, with colleagues and external vendors/clients.

  • Integrity: High level of professionalism and confidentiality in handling sensitive financial information.

📜 Job Requirements

  • Education: Minimum ITE, Diploma, or equivalent in Accounting, Finance, or a related field.

  • Experience: Entry-level candidates are welcome to apply.
    Previous internship experience or relevant accounting knowledge is a plus.

🚀 How to Apply

Interested candidates are invited to submit a detailed resume, stating current and expected salary, and availability.

We regret that only shortlisted candidates will be notified.

postedCompany.description:
Srisun Prata.Com’, serving only South Indian cuisine started out in 2004 with an outlet located at Block 418, Yishun Avenue 11. Over the years Srisun Prata.Com has expanded to 13 outlets island wide.

With regular customers increasing requests for North Indian cuisine as well as a desire to bring a wide variety of comfort food to the heartlands, Srisun Express was born in 2012  with its first outlet at Blk 212 Hougang St 21. Open 24hours, we were privileged to serve a wide spectrum of diners, from the weekday office crowd to families and the night owls who were just looking for a good place to ‘lepak and makan’ with friends.


Today, our menu has expanded to include perennial favourites of North & South Indian, Malaysian, Western and local cuisines. It doesn’t stop there. At Srisun Express we’re constantly looking to introduce new flavours, keeping your taste buds on the edge. Our new menu includes our very own signature Sugar Rush Prata, Honeymoon Prata, Masala Buffalo wings, Goreng Specials, and a whopping 54 types of savoury and dessert pratas, as well as a drink menu that ranges from the usual Teh Tarik to Butterscotch Milkshakes and Mango Mojitos.

We’re open 24 hours a day and with such an extensive menu, we hope to cater to every taste bud and craving. We’d like to thank you for dining on board the Srisun Express, now let the food adventure begin!
postedCompany.name: SUGA RESTAURANT & CATERING SERVICES PTE. LTD.
